LanguageData.VQED_AncientKinoScreen.label: ancient kino screen
LanguageData.VQED_AncientKinoScreen.description: A massive, old-world display once used for communal viewing. Grainy visuals flicker to life only when paired with a functioning kino projector. Still strangely captivating despite the static and distortion.
LanguageData.VQED_AncientKinoProjector.label: ancient kino projector
LanguageData.VQED_AncientKinoProjector.description: An old projector unit positioned for use with a matching screen. Works when powered, but only if pointed at the kino screen.
